title: SEBI appoints KVR Murty as Whole Time Member
description: KVR Murty, former Additional Controller General of Defence Accounts, has assumed charge as Whole Time Member of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI) on April 15, 2026.Murty brings over three decades of experience in public finance, corporate law, and governance to the market regulator.He holds a Master’s degree in Economics from the Delhi School of Economics.
